description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence set within a rectangular, fenced lot featuring a manicured lawn, driveway, and a backyard pool. The house has a white facade with multiple large windows, a prominent entryway, and a dark, multi-gabled roof. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and a paved driveway leading to a garage, while the backyard includes a swimming pool, patio area, and additional greenery. The property is bordered by a tall hedge and fencing for privacy. The structure appears to be single-story with a spacious, open layout and attached garage. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with symmetrical elements and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a white facade, dark gabled roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and the pool area in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, fencing, and the rear landscaping with pool and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large rear openings
